previousDayImpact: Austria created the day's cleanest leverage: it was exclusive to Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and delivered 6 points. England produced a five-point head-to-head swing, giving Team Choo Choo 7 points while Team Jordan collected only 2 from Croatia; Colombia's 6-point return was less differentiating because both Bijan Mustard and Team Mack owned it.
leaderboardSummary: Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz surged to first place, climbing five spots with 8 points gained from Austria and Portugal. Team Choo Choo also made a significant jump, moving up four places to second after England's win. Team koyn, the previous leader, fell to fifth place.
leverageWatch: South Korea-Mexico carries the strongest leaderboard leverage: first-place Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and co-second Team Choo Choo have Mexico, while fifth-place Team koyn and Metcalf Hurts have South Korea. Qatar-Canada creates another direct split between Team Camouflage Cndm and Team Godfather, while Switzerland is an exclusive opportunity for Team Pahl.
